ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., Women's Tops, Men's Bottoms) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the size chart was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the size chart was last updated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for which the size chart is applicable (e.g., Europe, UK) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of clothing (e.g., Tops, Bottoms, Dresses) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size chart is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart this size belongs to */,
  "eql_size" INTEGER /* European size format */,
  "uk_size" INTEGER /* UK size format */,
  "us_size" INTEGER /* US size format */,
  "au_size" INTEGER /* Australian size format */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of measurements */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size this measurement set belongs to */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range in CM */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range in CM */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement range in CM */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement range in CM */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range in CM */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range in CM */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the measurement set is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart that was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manager, customer service) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size chart */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the user has access to */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the access */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the recommendation */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was created */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the recommendation */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's measurement set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fit_recommendations_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the measurements belong to */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in CM */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in CM */,
  "hips" REAL /* Hips measurement in CM */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in CM */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in CM */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement in CM */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation this feedback relates to */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments from the user */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the feedback */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES fit_recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion record */,
  "source_size" INTEGER /* Size in the source sizing system */,
  "target_size" INTEGER /* Size in the target sizing system */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor used to convert sizes */,
  "source_sizing_system" TEXT /* Source sizing system (e.g., EQL, UK) */,
  "target_sizing_system" TEXT /* Target sizing system (e.g., US, AU) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_target_size FOREIGN KEY ("target_size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversion_source_size FOREIGN KEY ("source_size") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
